The ceremony started with a cruise on the Seine and ended in spectacular fashion at the Trocadero.

Sign up now:Get ST's newsletters delivered to your inbox

PublishedJul 27, 2024, 02:13 PM

UpdatedJul 27, 2024, 02:13 PM

People taking pictures of the Eiffel Tower as lasers light up the sky during the opening ceremony of the Olympic Games in Paris on July 26, 2024.

PHOTO: AFP

Smoke clouds in the French national colours are seen over Pont d'Austerlitz, which crosses the Seine river, during the opening ceremony.

PHOTO: AFP

French athletes on their boat at Pont d'Austerlitz on the river Seine during the opening ceremony.

PHOTO: REUTERS

Performers dancing along the banks of the Seine during the opening ceremony of the Olympic Games.

PHOTO: AFP

Singer Lady Gaga and other performers preparing for the opening ceremony.

PHOTO: REUTERS

US rapper and designer Pharrell Williams and French actress Laetitia Casta next to a trunk holding the Olympic torch in Saint-Denis, outside Paris, as part of the torch relay on July 26, 2024.

PHOTO: AFP

An Olympic torchbearer running atop the Musee d'Orsay during the opening ceremony.

PHOTO: AFP

President of the International Olympic Committee Thomas Bach speaking during the opening ceremony in Paris.

PHOTO: REUTERS

Former French footballer Zinedine Zidane carrying the Olympic torch at the Trocadero in Paris during the opening ceremony on July 26, 2024.

ST PHOTO: MARK CHEONG

President Tharman Shanmugaratnam and his spouse, Ms Jane Ittogi, waving their flags as the Singapore Olympic team appears on the screen at the Trocadero during the opening ceremony.

ST PHOTO: MARK CHEONG

French torchbearers, former sprinter Marie-Jose Perec and judoka Teddy Riner, next to the lit Olympic cauldron during the opening ceremony on July 26, 2024.

PHOTO: AFP

A light show with the Eiffel Tower in the background, as seen from the Trocadero during the opening ceremony.

ST PHOTO: MARK CHEONG

Canadian singer Celine Dion performing under the Olympic rings on the Eiffel Tower during the finale of the opening ceremony.

ST PHOTO: MARK CHEONG

title: In Pictures: The Olympic Games opening ceremony in Paris | The Straits Times
description: It started with a cruise on the Seine and ended in spectacular fashion at the Trocadero. Read more at straitstimes.com.
